sections.paragraph:
- Original: στρατιώτης

- Transliteration: Stratiotes

- Phonetic: strat-ee-o'-tace

- Definition:

1. a (common) soldier

2. metaph. a champion of the cause of Christ

- Origin: from a presumed derivative of the same as G4756

- TDNT entry: 18:41,1

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: From a presumed derivative of the same as G4756; a camperout that is a (common) warrior (literally or figuratively): - soldier.
